query: ("cool roof" OR "green roof" OR "living roof" OR "vegetated roof" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "high-albedo roof" OR "roof intervention" OR "rooftop cooling" OR "building envelope" OR "roof retrofit" OR "energy-efficient roof" OR "sustainable roof" OR "eco-roof" OR "cool pavement") AND ("urban heat island" OR "temperature reduction" OR "thermal environment" OR "heat exposure" OR "ambient temperature" OR "surface temperature" OR microclimate OR "cooling effect" OR "heat mitigation" OR "thermal comfort" OR "outdoor temperature") AND ("health outcome" OR morbidity OR mortality OR "heat-related illness" OR "thermal stress" OR cardiovascular OR respiratory OR "public health" OR "health impact" OR "heat exposure" OR "heat-related death" OR "hospital admission" OR "emergency department visit") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR RCT OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "causal inference" OR "intervention study" OR "before-after" OR "controlled study" OR evaluation OR impact OR "pre-post" OR "interrupted time series" OR "propensity score" OR "matching study" OR "observational study" OR "cohort study" OR "case-control" OR "cross-sectional" OR longitudinal)
